{{CargoRelic
|name=Disaster Pacifier
|class_id=20469
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=A disaster created by God once threatened the fate of mankind, but a mighty one came to the rescue, relieving humans of danger. This is the citation for him!
|fame=31
|art=17
|fth=15
|civ=10
|tech=17
|ss1=Per 500 Fissure Floors, Snail ATK +3<br>Fissure Floor: 15000/15000
|ss2=Per 500 Fissure Floors, Snail ATK +6<br>Fissure Floor: 15000/15000
|ss3=Per 500 Fissure Floors, Snail ATK +9<br>Fissure Floor: 15000/15000
|ss4=Per 500 Fissure Floors, Snail ATK +9<br>Fissure Floor: 15000/15000
|ss7=Per 500 Fissure Floors, Snail ATK +9<br>Fissure Floor: 15000/15000<br> (Awakened)
}}
